summary: Tested Contact to User Conversion feature. All 11 backend tests pass. Fixed missing linked_* fields in Contact Pydantic model. Frontend UI verified: Add User modal has 'Import from Contact' section with search input, Contact detail page shows 'Linked App Account' card when contact has linked_user_id.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Contact Pydantic model (models.py) was missing linked_user_id, linked_store_id, linked_store_name, linked_org_name, linked_role fields - these were being saved to MongoDB but filtered out in API responses
Backend admin.py (lines 957-985): Correctly handles source_contact_id - updates contact with linked_user_id, linked_role, linked_store_name, linked_org_name, and adds imos_user + imos_{role} tags
Frontend users.tsx (lines 164-189): searchContacts function correctly calls GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search=X and importFromContact fills form fields + sets selectedContactId
Frontend users.tsx (lines 207-218): handleCreateUser correctly sends source_contact_id in POST /api/admin/users/create payload
Frontend contact/[id].tsx (lines 2873-2898): Linked App Account card correctly displays when contact.linked_user_id exists, shows role and store/org name

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Import from Contact section visible, Linked App Account card visible)

seed_data_creation: Created test users with source_contact_id linking to 'API Test' contact (ID: 69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact to User Conversion feature fully tested and working. Key fix: Added linked_user_id, linked_store_id, linked_store_name, linked_org_name, linked_role fields to Contact Pydantic model in models.py. The 'API Test' contact (ID: 69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1) now has imos_user and imos_store_manager tags and shows the 'iMOS Manager Account' card on its detail page. Note: React Native Web TextInput search cannot be tested via Playwright (as noted in agent_to_agent_context_note), but backend API and frontend rendering are verified.

contact_search_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search=X: PASS - returns plain JSON array of contacts

user_creation_with_source_contact.POST /api/admin/users/create with source: PASS - creates user and links contact

frontend_ui.add_user_modal_import_section: PASS - 'Import from Contact' section visible with search input
frontend_ui.contact_detail_linked_account_card: PASS - 'iMOS Manager Account' card visible when contact has linked_user_id

bug_fix_applied.issue: Contact Pydantic model was missing linked_* fields, causing them to be filtered out in API responses
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added linked_user_id, linked_store_id, linked_store_name, linked_org_name, linked_role Optional[str] fields to Contact class
